flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at North Greenville University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.5k → $25.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at North Greenville University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.5k → $25.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Greenville University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at North Greenville University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.8k).
